TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract sealed beforefieldinit ChatClientBuilderExtensions extends System.Object

Docs.summary: Provides extension methods for configuring chat client builders.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatClientBuilder UseFoundryTools (this Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatClientBuilder builder, Azure.Core.TokenCredential? credential = default, params Azure.AI.AgentServer.Core.Tools.Models.FoundryTool[] foundryTools);

.method public static hidebysig class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatClientBuilder UseFoundryTools(class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatClientBuilder builder, class Azure.Core.TokenCredential credential, class Azure.AI.AgentServer.Core.Tools.Models.FoundryTool[] foundryTools) cil managed
<Extension()> Public Function UseFoundryTools (builder As ChatClientBuilder, Optional credential As TokenCredential = Nothing, ParamArray foundryTools As FoundryTool()) As ChatClientBuilder

static member UseFoundryTools : Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatClientBuilder * Azure.Core.TokenCredential * Azure.AI.AgentServer.Core.Tools.Models.FoundryTool[] -> Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatClientBuilder

Docs.param: Optional token credential for Foundry tool resolution. Defaults to when null.
The Foundry tool definitions to resolve.
Docs.summary: Adds Foundry tool discovery to the chat client pipeline and enables tool calling using the resolved tools.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatClientBuilder UseFoundryTools (this Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatClientBuilder builder, Azure.Core.TokenCredential? credential = default, params object[] foundryTools);

.method public static hidebysig class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatClientBuilder UseFoundryTools(class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatClientBuilder builder, class Azure.Core.TokenCredential credential, object[] foundryTools) cil managed
<Extension()> Public Function UseFoundryTools (builder As ChatClientBuilder, Optional credential As TokenCredential = Nothing, ParamArray foundryTools As Object()) As ChatClientBuilder
static member UseFoundryTools : Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatClientBuilder * Azure.Core.TokenCredential * obj[] -> Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatClientBuilder

Docs.param: Optional token credential for Foundry tool resolution. Defaults to when null.
Docs.summary: Adds Foundry tool discovery using dictionary or anonymous-object facades.
